description:
List directory contents in the Unity project.
Use this tool for directories; use read for files.
Useful for exploring project structure before using more targeted tools like unity_asset_search, unity_ref_search, or read.
- When Headroom is enabled and output exceeds the compress threshold, large listings are compressed through headroom-ai (requires headroom proxy or HEADROOM_API_KEY)

Output format: tree-style indented listing. Directories end with /. Plain entries without a trailing / are files. When include_files is false, all returned entries are directories.
Items exceeding the per-directory limit are indicated with '... and N more'.

Note: root-level generated directories such as Library/, Temp/, Obj/, Logs/, and Build*/ are automatically excluded from output. .meta files are also excluded because they are Unity-generated metadata and not useful for exploration.
You MUST set path explicitly; never rely on the current process directory or an implicit Assets/ default.

path.description: Root directory to list. Required. Pass an absolute path or a path relative to the selected project root.

depth.description: Maximum depth of recursion. 1 = only immediate children, 2 = children and grandchildren, etc. Default: 2.

max_items.description: Maximum number of child entries to show per directory. Excess entries are summarized. Default: 500.

max_total.description: Maximum total number of entries across all directories. When reached, recursion stops early. Default: 1000.

include_files.description: If true, list files in addition to directories. Default: false (directories only).
